About Early Bird Roof Repair And Replacement

12+ years serving Seattle and surrounding areas

Early Bird Roof Repair And Replacement started with a simple mission: to provide Seattle homeowners with reliable, high-quality carpentry services they could depend on. Founded by a Seattle native with a passion for preserving the city's architectural heritage, we've grown into a team of skilled carpenters dedicated to excellence.

Our approach is rooted in honesty, integrity, and a commitment to exceeding expectations. We believe in clear communication, transparent pricing, and meticulous attention to detail. From the initial consultation to the final nail, we work closely with our clients to ensure their vision becomes a reality.

We're proud to be a part of the Seattle community and are committed to giving back. We actively support local initiatives and organizations that promote sustainable building practices and affordable housing. We believe in building not only structures but also lasting relationships within our city.

12+ Years in Business
800+ Projects Completed
97% Client Satisfaction
20+ Team Members
Early Bird Roof Repair And Replacement

Trusted carpenter professionals serving Seattle, WA and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
